ddls:
CREATE TABLE "typed_arrays" (
  "array_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each typed array */,
  "constructor_name" TEXT /* Name of the constructor function used to create the array */,
  "element_type" TEXT /* Type of elements in the array (e.g., Int8, Uint8) */,
  "element_size" INTEGER /* Size of each element in bytes */,
  "conversion_operation" TEXT /* Operation used to convert values to the array's element type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the typed array */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the array */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the array was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the array */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the array was last modified */,
  "current_version" INTEGER /* Current version of the array */,
  "array_data" TEXT /* Array data in a serialized format */,
  "last_accessed_at" TEXT /* Last access timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("array_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_typed_arrays_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_typed_arrays_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, admin, data analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "current_workspace_id" INTEGER /* Current workspace or project ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "array_project_map" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "array_id" INTEGER /* ID of the typed array */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the array to the project */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the array was assigned to the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_array_project_map_array_id FOREIGN KEY ("array_id") REFERENCES typed_arrays ("array_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_array_project_map_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_array_project_map_assigned_by FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "array_operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation */,
  "array_id" INTEGER /* ID of the typed array */,
  "operation_name" TEXT /* Name of the operation (e.g., set, get, fill) */,
  "operation_params" TEXT /* Parameters used for the operation */,
  "executed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the operation */,
  "executed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the operation was executed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the operation */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Execution time */,
  "result_data" TEXT /* Result data in a serialized format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_array_operations_array_id FOREIGN KEY ("array_id") REFERENCES typed_arrays ("array_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_array_operations_executed_by FOREIGN KEY ("executed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "array_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "array_id" INTEGER /* ID of the typed array */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the array */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the array was accessed */,
  "accessed_at_tz" TEXT /* Access timestamp with timezone information */,
  "accessed_from_ip" TEXT /* User's IP address during access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_array_access_logs_array_id FOREIGN KEY ("array_id") REFERENCES typed_arrays ("array_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_array_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "array_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "array_id" INTEGER /* ID of the typed array */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_array_metadata_array_id FOREIGN KEY ("array_id") REFERENCES typed_arrays ("array_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_array_metadata_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "array_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "array_id" INTEGER /* ID of the typed array */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_data" TEXT /* Data of the array in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_array_versions_array_id FOREIGN KEY ("array_id") REFERENCES typed_arrays ("array_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_array_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "array_sharing" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sharing event */,
  "array_id" INTEGER /* ID of the typed array */,
  "from_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user sharing the array */,
  "to_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the array */,
  "shared_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the array was shared */,
  "shared_at_tz" TEXT /* Sharing timestamp with timezone information */,
  "sharing_status" TEXT /* Sharing status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_array_sharing_to_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_array_sharing_array_id FOREIGN KEY ("array_id") REFERENCES typed_arrays ("array_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_array_sharing_from_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "array_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "array_id" INTEGER /* ID of the typed array */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., execution time, memory usage) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "measured_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was measured */,
  "measured_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who measured the metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "metric_value_data" TEXT /* Metric value in a serialized format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_array_performance_array_id FOREIGN KEY ("array_id") REFERENCES typed_arrays ("array_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_array_performance_measured_by FOREIGN KEY ("measured_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "array_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "array_id" INTEGER /* ID of the typed array */,
  "dependent_array_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dependent typed array */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., input, output) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dependency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_array_dependencies_array_id FOREIGN KEY ("array_id") REFERENCES typed_arrays ("array_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_array_dependencies_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_array_dependencies_dependent_array_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_array_id") REFERENCES typed_arrays ("array_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "array_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "array_id" INTEGER /* ID of the typed array */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "commented_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_array_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_array_comments_array_id FOREIGN KEY ("array_id") REFERENCES typed_arrays ("array_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "array_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "array_id" INTEGER /* ID of the typed array */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_array_tags_array_id FOREIGN KEY ("array_id") REFERENCES typed_arrays ("array_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_array_tags_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "array_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "array_id" INTEGER /* ID of the typed array */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic (e.g., mean, median, standard deviation) */,
  "stat_value" TEXT /* Value of the statistic */,
  "calculated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who calculated the statistic */,
  "calculated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the statistic was calculated */,
  "stat_value_data" TEXT /* Statistic value in a serialized format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_array_statistics_array_id FOREIGN KEY ("array_id") REFERENCES typed_arrays ("array_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_array_statistics_calculated_by FOREIGN KEY ("calculated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
